message: feat: add pasteboard preservation delivery core

files.patch: @@ -0,0 +1,121 @@ +import XCTest +@testable import GhostPepper + +final class PasteboardControllerTests: XCTestCase { + func testCaptureReturnsNilWhenPasteboardIsEmpty() { + let pasteboard = FakeRawPasteboard() + let controller = GeneralPasteboardController(pasteboard: pasteboard) + + XCTAssertNil(controller.captureContents()) + } + + func testCaptureSavesAllItemsAndTypeRepresentations() { + let firstItem = FakeRawPasteboardItem(representations: [ + "public.utf8-plain-text": Data("hello".utf8), + "public.html": Data("hello".utf8), + ]) + let secondItem = FakeRawPasteboardItem(representations: [ + "public.file-url": Data("file:///tmp/demo".utf8), + ]) + let pasteboard = FakeRawPasteboard(items: [firstItem, secondItem]) + let controller = GeneralPasteboardController(pasteboard: pasteboard) + + let snapshot = controller.captureContents() + + XCTAssertEqual( + snapshot, + PasteboardSnapshot(items: [ + PasteboardItemSnapshot(representations: [ + "public.html": Data("hello".utf8), + "public.utf8-plain-text": Data("hello".utf8), + ]), + PasteboardItemSnapshot(representations: [ + "public.file-url": Data("file:///tmp/demo".utf8), + ]), + ]) + ) + } + + func testWritePlainTextClearsPasteboardBeforeWritingStringType() { + let pasteboard = FakeRawPasteboard() + let controller = GeneralPasteboardController(pasteboard: pasteboard) + + controller.writePlainText("transcribed text") + + XCTAssertEqual(pasteboard.events, [ + .clearContents, + .writePlainText("transcribed text", "public.utf8-plain-text"), + ]) + } + + func testRestoreClearsPasteboardAndWritesItemsInSingleBatch() { + let pasteboard = FakeRawPasteboard() + let controller = GeneralPasteboardController(pasteboard: pasteboard) + let snapshot = PasteboardSnapshot(items: [ + PasteboardItemSnapshot(representations: [ + "public.utf8-plain-text": Data("hello".utf8), + "public.html": Data("hello".utf8), + ]), + PasteboardItemSnapshot(representations: [ + "public.file-url": Data("file:///tmp/demo".utf8), + ]), + ]) + + controller.restoreContents(snapshot) + + XCTAssertEqual( + pasteboard.events, + [ + .clearContents, + .writeItems([ + [ + "public.html": Data("hello".utf8), + "public.utf8-plain-text": Data("hello".utf8), + ], + [ + "public.file-url": Data("file:///tmp/demo".utf8), + ], + ]), + ] + ) + } +} + +private final class FakeRawPasteboard: RawPasteboard { + enum Event: Equatable { + case clearContents + case writePlainText(String, String) + case writeItems([[String: Data]]) + } + + var items: [any RawPasteboardItem] + private(set) var events: [Event] = [] + + init(items: [any RawPasteboardItem] = []) { + self.items = items + } + + func clearContents() { + events.append(.clearContents) + } + + func setString(_ string: String, forType type: String) { + events.append(.writePlainText(string, type)) + } + + func writeItems(_ items: [[String: Data]]) { + events.append(.writeItems(items)) + } +} + +private struct FakeRawPasteboardItem: RawPasteboardItem { + let representations: [String: Data] + + var types: [String] { + Array(representations.keys) + } + + func data(forType type: String) -> Data? { + representations[type] + } +}

@@ -0,0 +1,205 @@
+import CoreGraphics
+import XCTest
+@testable import GhostPepper
+
+@MainActor
+final class TextPasteDelivererTests: XCTestCase {
+    func testDeliverRestoresClipboardAfterSuccessfulPasteAndFiresLifecycleCallbacks() async {
+        let snapshot = PasteboardSnapshot(items: [
+            PasteboardItemSnapshot(representations: [
+                "public.utf8-plain-text": Data("before".utf8),
+            ]),
+        ])
+        let pasteboard = FakePasteboardController(snapshot: snapshot)
+        let detector = FakePasteTargetDetector(result: true)
+        let keystrokes = FakePasteKeystrokePreparer()
+        let session = PasteSessionSnapshot(
+            pastedText: "transcribed text",
+            timestamp: Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 1234),
+            applicationBundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor",
+            windowID: 77,
+            windowFrame: CGRect(x: 10, y: 20, width: 300, height: 200),
+            focusedElementFrame: CGRect(x: 50, y: 80, width: 120, height: 40),
+            focusedElementText: "transcribed text"
+        )
+        let capturer = FakePasteSessionCapturer(snapshot: session)
+        let sleeper = FakeDelaySleeper()
+        let deliverer = TextPasteDeliverer(
+            pasteboard: pasteboard,
+            targetDetector: detector,
+            keystrokePreparer: keystrokes,
+            sessionCapturer: capturer,
+            sleeper: sleeper
+        )
+        var lifecycle: [String] = []
+
+        let result = await deliverer.deliver("transcribed text", callbacks: PasteLifecycleCallbacks(
+            onPasteStart: {
+                lifecycle.append("start")
+            },
+            onPasteSession: { received in
+                XCTAssertEqual(received, session)
+                lifecycle.append("session")
+            },
+            onPasteEnd: { received in
+                XCTAssertEqual(received, .pasted)
+                lifecycle.append("end")
+            }
+        ))
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(result, .pasted)
+        XCTAssertEqual(pasteboard.events, [
+            .capture,
+            .write("transcribed text"),
+            .restore(snapshot),
+        ])
+        XCTAssertEqual(detector.callCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(keystrokes.prepareCallCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(keystrokes.sendCallCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(capturer.calls, ["transcribed text"])
+        XCTAssertEqual(sleeper.durations, [.milliseconds(50), .milliseconds(100)])
+        XCTAssertEqual(lifecycle, ["start", "session", "end"])
+    }
+
+    func testDeliverFallsBackWhenNoPasteTargetIsAvailable() async {
+        let snapshot = PasteboardSnapshot(items: [
+            PasteboardItemSnapshot(representations: ["public.utf8-plain-text": Data("before".utf8)]),
+        ])
+        let pasteboard = FakePasteboardController(snapshot: snapshot)
+        let detector = FakePasteTargetDetector(result: false)
+        let keystrokes = FakePasteKeystrokePreparer()
+        let capturer = FakePasteSessionCapturer(snapshot: nil)
+        let sleeper = FakeDelaySleeper()
+        let deliverer = TextPasteDeliverer(
+            pasteboard: pasteboard,
+            targetDetector: detector,
+            keystrokePreparer: keystrokes,
+            sessionCapturer: capturer,
+            sleeper: sleeper
+        )
+        var endResults: [PasteDeliveryResult] = []
+
+        let result = await deliverer.deliver("transcribed text", callbacks: PasteLifecycleCallbacks(
+            onPasteEnd: { endResults.append($0) }
+        ))
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(result, .copiedToClipboard)
+        XCTAssertEqual(pasteboard.events, [.capture, .write("transcribed text")])
+        XCTAssertEqual(detector.callCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(keystrokes.prepareCallCount, 0)
+        XCTAssertEqual(keystrokes.sendCallCount, 0)
+        XCTAssertEqual(capturer.calls, [])
+        XCTAssertEqual(sleeper.durations, [])
+        XCTAssertEqual(endResults, [.copiedToClipboard])
+    }
+
+    func testDeliverFallsBackWhenKeystrokePreparationFails() async {
+        let snapshot = PasteboardSnapshot(items: [
+            PasteboardItemSnapshot(representations: ["public.utf8-plain-text": Data("before".utf8)]),
+        ])
+        let pasteboard = FakePasteboardController(snapshot: snapshot)
+        let detector = FakePasteTargetDetector(result: true)
+        let keystrokes = FakePasteKeystrokePreparer()
+        keystrokes.shouldPrepare = false
+        let capturer = FakePasteSessionCapturer(snapshot: nil)
+        let sleeper = FakeDelaySleeper()
+        let deliverer = TextPasteDeliverer(
+            pasteboard: pasteboard,
+            targetDetector: detector,
+            keystrokePreparer: keystrokes,
+            sessionCapturer: capturer,
+            sleeper: sleeper
+        )
+
+        let result = await deliverer.deliver("transcribed text")
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(result, .copiedToClipboard)
+        XCTAssertEqual(pasteboard.events, [.capture, .write("transcribed text")])
+        XCTAssertEqual(detector.callCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(keystrokes.prepareCallCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(keystrokes.sendCallCount, 0)
+        XCTAssertEqual(capturer.calls, [])
+        XCTAssertEqual(sleeper.durations, [])
+    }
+}
+
+private final class FakePasteboardController: PasteboardControlling {
+    enum Event: Equatable {
+        case capture
+        case write(String)
+        case restore(PasteboardSnapshot)
+    }
+
+    var snapshot: PasteboardSnapshot?
+    private(set) var events: [Event] = []
+
+    init(snapshot: PasteboardSnapshot?) {
+        self.snapshot = snapshot
+    }
+
+    func captureContents() -> PasteboardSnapshot? {
+        events.append(.capture)
+        return snapshot
+    }
+
+    func writePlainText(_ text: String) {
+        events.append(.write(text))
+    }
+
+    func restoreContents(_ snapshot: PasteboardSnapshot) {
+        events.append(.restore(snapshot))
+    }
+}
+
+private final class FakePasteTargetDetector: PasteTargetDetecting {
+    let result: Bool
+    private(set) var callCount = 0
+
+    init(result: Bool) {
+        self.result = result
+    }
+
+    func canPasteToFocusedElement() -> Bool {
+        callCount += 1
+        return result
+    }
+}
+
+private final class FakePasteKeystrokePreparer: PasteKeystrokePreparing {
+    var shouldPrepare = true
+    private(set) var prepareCallCount = 0
+    private(set) var sendCallCount = 0
+
+    func makePreparedPaste() -> PreparedPasteAction? {
+        prepareCallCount += 1
+        guard shouldPrepare else {
+            return nil
+        }
+
+        return { [weak self] in
+            self?.sendCallCount += 1
+        }
+    }
+}
+
+private final class FakePasteSessionCapturer: PasteSessionCapturing {
+    let snapshot: PasteSessionSnapshot?
+    private(set) var calls: [String] = []
+
+    init(snapshot: PasteSessionSnapshot?) {
+        self.snapshot = snapshot
+    }
+
+    func capture(pastedText: String) -> PasteSessionSnapshot? {
+        calls.append(pastedText)
+        return snapshot
+    }
+}
+
+private final class FakeDelaySleeper: DelaySleeping {
+    private(set) var durations: [Duration] = []
+
+    func sleep(for duration: Duration) async {
+        durations.append(duration)
+    }
+}
